<!-- Use this template for documentation-only issues. For code bugs, use Bug Report. -->

## Issue Type

<!-- Mark all that apply -->

- [ ] Unclear / ambiguous wording
- [ ] Outdated (no longer matches code or process)
- [ ] Incorrect (factually wrong)
- [ ] Missing (a topic that should be documented but isn't)
- [ ] Inconsistent with another document (specify which)
- [ ] Broken link / reference

<!-- What is wrong or missing? -->
